content_body: Our family had an AWESOME time for a family reunion. We also had Fallen Timber and Riverview. We enjoyed rafting with Ocoee Outdoor Adventures, renting a pontoon with Nottely Marina Inc. in Blairsville, tubing with Toccoa River Adventures, and ziplining with Blue Ridge Canopy Tours! The river was a great place to hang out and play games. Hiking to Benton Falls (1.5-mile hike in) was beautiful and the 40-minute drive was a scenic favorite for us. Thank you!!!
title: AWESOME Time!
